mapper.sql: modelNo, supplyId, orgCountryId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, updateTime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_deli
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_deli (modelNo, supplyId, orgCountryId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, updateTime) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.product_deli
modelNo,
supplyId,
orgCountryId,
stdDlvDay,
stdDlvDateMaxNumber,
maxProdQty,
enableMaxProdQty,
isPrimary,
supplierPartNo,
updateTime,
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT},
#{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT},
#{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dbo.product_deli
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplyId = #{record.supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
maxProdQty = #{record.maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableMaxProdQty = #{record.enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT},
isPrimary = #{record.isprimary,jdbcType=BIT},
supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.product_deli set modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplyId = #{record.supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxProdQty = #{record.maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableMaxProdQty = #{record.enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, isPrimary = #{record.isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.product_deli
orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
maxProdQty = #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableMaxProdQty = #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT},
isPrimary = #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT},
supplierPartNo = #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and supplyId = #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_deli set orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxProdQty = #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableMaxProdQty = #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, isPrimary = #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, supplierPartNo = #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and supplyId = #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
